mnemonics: Walk and Swap: Imagine two friends walking from opposite ends of a line, swapping their items as they meet in the middle.
keyPoints: Use two pointers: one starting at the head, one at the tail.
Swap the data of the nodes pointed to by the two pointers.
Move the pointers towards the center until they meet or cross.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to handle the case of an empty list or a list with a single node.
Incorrectly updating the pointers, leading to an infinite loop or loss of nodes.
Attempting to swap the nodes themselves instead of just swapping the data within the nodes.
